title: Clidemia cymosa
taxonomy: Clidemia cymosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to South America, specifically in countries such as Brazil, Argentina, and Paraguay. It belongs to the genus Clidemia, which comprises several species of shrubs and small trees. The family Melastomataceae, to which Clidemia cymosa belongs, is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. The classification of Clidemia cymosa is further supported by its position in the order Myrtales, a large and diverse order of flowering plants.
